entry.title: SAP CodeJam : Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Sydney Community,

We are announcing a SAP CodeJam event. It is on the topic of SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Applications. In this session, we will learn how to Deploy and configure an instance of the SAP HANA Cloud trial, develop a multi-target application using SAP Business Application Studio and SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, and create a service layer and SAP Fiori UI that also includes SAP HANA native artifacts, such as calculation views.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Tuesday 20 June 2023 in Sydney, AU from 09:00 - 16:00 GMT+10. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructor is Developer Advocate Thomas Jung. This is a fantastic opportunity to learn as well as meet Thomas and network with other community members.

Please check the requisites and register for the event using the below link

https://groups.community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-codejam-cloud-application-programming-model-with-sap-hana/ev-p/259136

See you all there!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation with Business Rules Workaround
entry.content: Thanks for sharing Ramon

entry.title: SAP ANZ TechHub in Sydney 14-Sep-2023
entry.content:
SAP TechHub is technology event run by SAP in many cities across ANZ. The goal is to build a community of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Evangelists and Professionals in our Customer & Partner ecosystem to accelerate adoption of Cloud Technology.

We're excited to announce that we are bringing the SAP ANZ Tech Hub community event to Sydney, and we would love to have you join us in our North Sydney office on Thursday, September 14, 2023.​

If you are an Architect, a Developer, a Tech Manager, emerging talent or are just curious about technology our SAP ANZ Tech Hub workshop will provide you with an opportunity to:

  • Explore new technologies and functionality available within SAP Business Technology Platform 
  • Get hands-on and understand how you can fuel innovation through interactive demonstrations
  • Help shape roadmaps by providing feedback to SAP tech experts 
  • Be the change! Meet our experts, network with your ecosystem, and innovate with your peers

Don’t miss this opportunity to network with your colleagues, peers and SAP technical experts who can guide you to become a Future Ready Enterprise on the SAP Business Technology Platform. 

The sessions will run from 9:30 AM – 5:00 PM and you have the option of selecting one session of your choice. 

Refreshments and lunch will be provided. 

Register here.

entry.title: Re: Call for Proposals: Become a SAP Community Talk speaker at SAP TechEd 2023 in Bangalore!
entry.content: I always look forward to SAP Community talk @ TechEd.

entry.title: SAP Community "watch-and-code" party is coming to Sydney
entry.content:
In the spirit of fostering collaboration, knowledge sharing, and engagement, we are thrilled to announce the SAP Community "watch-and-code" parties! Running concurrently with SAP TechEd, this global half-day in-person event concept promises an exceptional opportunity for SAP enthusiasts to come together, network, learn, and code!

The SAP Community "watch-and-code" parties have been thoughtfully designed to provide a unique platform where developers, SAP enthusiasts, and professionals from all corners of the world can gather for an enriching experience with SAP TechEd at the heart of the event.

Networking, learning and coding
Participants will be able to rewatch the SAP TechEd keynote together and take part in a Q&A session and lively discussions with experts about the latest development updates. One of the highlights of the half-day event is the hands-on mini code jam session focused on extending SAP S/4HANA via SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Technical experts will host the session that covers both CAP and RAP, and invites ABAP developers to delve into the world of CAP and vice versa. 
Be ready for a day full of engagement and networking!

Register using below link

Sydney (Australia) - Register now!

entry.title: Enterprise Architect SAP Community Group will meet in Sydney
entry.content:
For the first time, the Enterprise Architect SAP Community Group will meet in several location in Australia!

The meetups will be informal events where you can discuss, exchange ideas, share your knowledge, learn from peers and experts, and just meet new and old friends.

This is your chance to get together with Enterprise Architects in Sydney, Melbourne or Brisbane and also get plugged into the global Enterprise Architecture SAP Community.

The events are FREE to attend.

Attend any one of our meetups in October, located at various SAP Offices including Sydney, Melbourne or Brisbane, from 1:00 pm to 4:30 pm for the main program, immediately followed by networking and drinks nearby from 4:30 pm to 6:00 pm. Just click on your choice location at the bottom of this page.

Topics to be discussed include:

  • Sharing session: sharing and exchanging ideas, pains, solutions, and tips & tricks
  • Top 10 Things Enterprise Architect’s Need to Know and Do - SAP Community 2024 Edition
  • SAP’s Cloud Strategy
  • An Enterprise Architect’s Guide to SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Essential Frameworks, Tools & Skills for Enterprise Architects
  • 2024 Work Stream Topics - SAP Community Enterprise Architecture Group

Are you ready?

The first 20 people to sign up will receive a copy of this ebook: “Strategy to Reality: Making the Impossible Possible for Business Architects, Change Makers, and Strategy Execution Leaders” by Whynde Kuehn.

Register Now

  • Location: SAP Office Level 13/1 Denison St, North Sydney NSW
  • Date: October 24, 2023
  • Time: 1:00pm - 4:30pm followed by networking and drinks from 4:30pm to 6:00pm

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA integration with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi Prashant, Thanks for sharing this update.

Good to see that SAP Event Mesh is no longer required in between S/4HANA & AEM.

Is “SAP NetWeaver add-on for event” in S/4HANA included for the use with AEM?

entry.title: Re: Extending legacy Fiori apps in BAS
entry.content: Thanks for posting about this new feature

entry.title: Re: Did you join SAP TechEd 2023 in Bengaluru? - If yes, share with us your best moments here!!
entry.content: It was a fantastic experience @maheshpalavalli. I travelled from Australia and been to TechEd Bangalore few times before. I learnt a lot just being in the keynotes. Meeting community members in-person was my highlight.  See you in the next event.

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Sydney Nov '23
entry.content: See you there.

entry.title: RAP & CAP Extension Development
entry.content: I would like to know if its common to see developers who build extensions on top of their S/4HANA system using both CAP and RAP programming models. I understand the difference between these two models - but curious to know if there are developers who have the skills to either use CAP or RAP depending on the requirements.

entry.content: Thanks for posting the detailed steps.

entry.title: SAP BTP Innovation Day - Coming to Sydney
entry.content:
Come join us in Sydney on March 20, at the Crown for a multi-track event and revolutionise your approach to digital transformation. Aside from exciting keynotes by SAP and partners, the day will be divided into three tracks focussing on Building innovation that deliver business outcomes, leveraging business data fabric for context outcomes, and realising continuous business transformation, where You will hear from SAP and partner experts talking about using innovation and data analytics for transformations for better outcomes.

We will also be talking about:

  • AI-Powered Collaboration: Explore AI-powered tools in SAP Build Code designed to enhance collaboration and boost development efficiency, all while minimising costs
  • Igniting Innovation: Dive into SAP BTP’s AI Foundation, a catalyst for innovation, enabling you to launch competitive business models with efficiency
  • Market Insights: Leverage advanced analytics within SAP BTP to gain invaluable market insights, driving strategic decision-making for your organisation
  • Seamless Integration: Discover the SAP Integration Suite, featuring the new Graph capability, ensuring smooth integration across functions, resulting in streamlined operations

The day will be filled with knowledgeable speakers, exciting content, product showcases and a chance to meet and network with SAP experts and partners.

DATE: 20 March 2024  | TIME: 8:30 am - 4:30 pm 
VENUE: The Crown, 1 Barangaroo Ave, Barangaroo NSW 2000

Click Here to access Registration Page.
